articles.title: Polygon makes the case for scaling solutions after ETH 2.0
articles.description: London hard fork is live and Ethereum users are hoping high gas fees will be a thing of the past. Will ETH improvements phase out layer-2 scaling protocols? Polygon’s co-founder thinks not.

articles.description: Leading Dogecoin (DOGE) advocates Mark Cuban and Elon Musk have voiced their support for the meme-inspired altcoin as its price continues to climb.

articles.title: Dogecoin to Feature on Watford F.C. Sleeves This Season
articles.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) will serve as the shirt sleeve sponsor for Premier League football team Watford F.C. during the 2021/22 season.

articles.title: Mark Cuban Argues He Doesn’t Shill Doge But Fans Using Dogecoin Will Pay Less
articles.description: Mark Cuban called Dogecoin "the people's way to pay," as he refuted assumptions that he was trying to shill the meme coin.

articles.title: DOGE Is “People’s Way to Pay” As 95% of My Customers Choose Dogecoin: Billionaire Mark Cuban

articles.title: An Introduction To Solana: Innovations, Characteristics, And Criticism
articles.description: Will Solana be the one? The race to be the prime smart-contract-enabled blockchain is heating up. Many projects are chasing Ethereum’s tail, offering faster and cheaper transactions plus technological innovations. What does Solana offer? An internal clock. An incredibly higher number of transactions. Fees so low that are almost non-existent. The possibility to scale to global adoption in their...
